problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
